scenario.name: Basic OPTION UAC
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [2001:345b:5674:1923:5060;[field3] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 OPTIONS Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Length: 0 Accept: application/sdp
